description: Style NoteCool surfing brand quiksilver has a great range of casual clothing to suit style conscious dressers who have active lifestyles. Wear this shirt with jeans and comfortable footwear from the wide collection available at myntra.Product DetailsBlue checked shirt, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, short sleeves and patc pocket and embroidered branding on the left chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash inside outDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool iron inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18")  is wearing a size M
